description: Configuration file for generating dynamic Cusco and Machu Picchu packages. It does not contain hardcoded itineraries; it defines rules, references, durations, arrival/departure profiles, operating restrictions and metadata for search, cards and product detail pages.

arrival.title: Pickup from airport or bus terminal
arrival.description: Included service at the beginning of the package, coordinated according to your actual arrival time.

departure.title: Transfer to airport or bus terminal
departure.description: Included service at the end of the package, coordinated according to your actual departure time.

packageCards.title: Cusco & Machu Picchu Package 3 Days / 2 Nights
packageCards.shortDescription: A short, flexible getaway to experience Cusco and Machu Picchu with options such as a City Tour, cultural visits and a well-organized citadel experience.
packageCards.recommendedTitle: Escapada esencial a Cusco and Machu Picchu

seo.title: Cusco & Machu Picchu Package 3 Days / 2 Nights | My Cusco Trip
seo.description: A short, flexible getaway to experience Cusco and Machu Picchu with options such as a City Tour, cultural visits and a well-organized citadel experience.

faq.q: How is this package organized?
faq.a: The package is built as a flexible 3 days / 2 nights route with main experiences, transfers, trains and accommodation according to the selected option.

faq.q: Does it include a guide?
faq.a: Yes. Package tours include a professional guide in Spanish and English. Other languages are coordinated upon request and may have an additional cost.

faq.q: What is included in the base package?
faq.a: It includes arrival and departure transfers, travel assistance, tourist transport according to the program and the experiences indicated in the itinerary.

faq.q: What is not included?
faq.a: Domestic or international flights, personal expenses, voluntary tips, services not mentioned and optional upgrades not selected are not included.

faq.q: Can I choose hotels and trains?
faq.a: Yes. You can review hotel and train options when the package allows it; the fare adjusts according to the selected category.

faq.q: Are extras translated and calculated separately?
faq.a: Yes. Extras such as tourist tickets, entrance fees or lunches appear translated and can be added before completing the reservation.

salesNotes: Debe priorizar Machu Picchu Full Day and solo agregar half day si los horarios lo permiten.
Allows one additional excursion such as Humantay, Vinicunca or Seven Lagoons.
If the Sacred Valley connection is used, switch Machu Picchu to overnight.
Ideal duration for City Tour, Sacred Valley, Machu Picchu and one trek.
Valle VIP puede reemplazar Sacred Valley + Maras para evitar duplicidad.
Allows two nature routes if schedules and rest time are compatible.
If there is a trek after Machu Picchu, use Overnight Express.
Enough duration to combine classics and alternative routes.
Keep a maximum of two treks to avoid fatigue.
Allows more complete packages with rest days in between.
No renderizar todas las combinaciones; priorizar las mejores opciones por ranking.
Usar days libres o experiencias cortas para mejorar UX and no saturar el viaje.
Ideal for train, hotel and private experience upsells.
Maximum Cusco duration before moving to packages-peru.json.
Keep scalability for future experiences such as private routes or themed packages.

sacredValleyConnection.description: When the Sacred Valley is used as a connection to Ollantaytambo or Aguas Calientes, the package should switch Machu Picchu to overnight mode.

trekkingAfterMachuPicchu.description: If there is a trek after Machu Picchu, use Machu Picchu Overnight Express to return earlier and allow operational rest.

valleVip.description: Valle VIP incluye Maras/Moray; si se selecciona esta variante, no agregar Maras and Moray como day independiente.

optionUi.title: Choose the route that best matches your travel pace, interests and preferred places to visit. You can switch options without losing your reservation.
